<!-- Generated by StoryRail. Safe to regenerate. -->
# AGENTS.md

## Source of Truth

Read these files before changing code:
- docs/ai/architecture.md
- docs/ai/coding-standards.md
- docs/ai/testing-strategy.md
- specs/<feature>/technical-design.md
- specs/<feature>/tasks.yaml

## Required Workflow

1. Do not code before a spec and test plan exist.
2. Implement only tasks listed in tasks.yaml.
3. Do not edit unrelated files.
4. Run required checks before marking work complete.
5. Open a PR; never push directly to main.

## Review Guidelines

Flag as P0:
- auth bypass
- payment or quota regression
- hardcoded secrets
- destructive migration
- logging PII
